Initial drill results show polymetallic mineralization at Mirasol’s Sobek Project in Chile, with gold, silver, zinc, and lead. Located 3km from a major discovery, the project is in the Vicuña District.
news.summary: Mirasol Resources Ltd. has revealed promising findings from drilling activities confirming a mineralized hydrothermal breccia system rich in gold, silver, zinc, and lead, with signs of copper at the Sobek Copper-Gold Project in Chile. The company, listed on TSX-V as MRZ and OTC as MRZLF, reported these initial results from the 100%-owned project located in the Vicuña District. Specifically, at the Potro SE target within the Sobek North property block, situated just 3km southwest of NGEx’s Lunahuasi discovery, significant mineral deposits were identified. This area had not undergone drilling tests previously, highlighting the potential for valuable reserves in a strategic location.

news.headline: Largest crypto hacks ever: Billions stolen via hacks, exploits from exchanges. Top 5 heists revealed.
news.summary: Hackers have successfully stolen billions of dollars in cryptocurrency from exchanges and networks through various hacks and exploits. These incidents constitute the five largest heists in the industry.

news.headline: American Salars to expand Pocitos project by 1,635% to 13,880 hectares in Argentina's Lithium Triangle, acquiring 10 mineral tenements.
news.summary: American Salars Lithium Inc. has recently announced the signing of a Letter of Intent Agreement to acquire up to 100% of the Salar De Pocitos Project. The project includes 10 mineral tenements spread across about 13,080 hectares, adjacent to the company’s existing 800 hectare Flagship Pocitos 1 Project in Salta Province, Argentina. This acquisition marks a significant increase in property size by 1635%, resulting in a combined total of 13,880 hectares on the Pocitos Salar, located in the Lithium Triangle. Upon completion of the transaction, American Salars will possess the second largest property asset on the Salar de Pocitos.

news.headline: Solana drops 45% post-Trump token launch as memecoins draw liquidity, insiders say.
news.summary: According to industry insiders interviewed by Cointelegraph, the increasing popularity of memecoins could be hindering Solana's price growth.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency market tumult with Dogecoin, Bitcoin, Ethereum fluctuations, potential final Dogecoin spike predicted by analyst.
news.summary: Last week in the volatile cryptocurrency market, major coins such as Dogecoin (DOGE), Bitcoin (BTC), and Ethereum (ETH) went through significant fluctuations. Amidst positive predictions and sudden drops, investors were kept on edge. Notably, cryptocurrency analyst Cas Abbé forecasted a potential final surge for Dogecoin, which could propel the meme coin towards its previous all-time highs. Abbé drew parallels between current market conditions and those in the first half of 2021 when Dogecoin peaked at $0.70. The analyst anticipates that the next surge in DOGE will be primarily driven by Elon Musk and the excitement surrounding D.O.G.E.

news.headline: Lockheed Martin, Nokia, and Verizon collaborate on 5G.MIL for defense. Integrated Nokia's 5G solutions into Lockheed Martin base station.
news.summary: A recent demonstration showcased progress in enhancing compatibility between commercial 5G networks and military communication systems. The integration of Nokia's advanced 5G solutions and Verizon's network management features into Lockheed Martin's 5G.MIL hybrid base station proved successful. This event took place in Bethesda, Maryland on March 2, 2025. The collaboration aimed to improve interoperability, with significant implications for military communications and operations.

news.headline: Nokia, partners push AI-RAN development faster at MWC25.
Cannabis industry news this week: LFTD expands into Illinois, Trulieve launches THC-infused drinks, Ice Cube's new brand, CAKE's Nevada launch, and Curaleaf partners with Total Wine for distribution.
news.summary: This week in the cannabis industry saw several significant developments. LFTD Partners Inc. (OTCQB:LIFD) announced plans to expand into the Illinois cannabis market with acquisitions of craft grow, infuser, and transport licenses, along with retail businesses and industrial properties. Trulieve Cannabis Corp. (OTCQX:TCNNF) introduced a new THC-infused beverage line named Onward, catering to consumers seeking alternatives to alcohol. Ice Cube launched his cannabis brand, Fryday Kush, in partnership with Priscilla Vilchis. Germany's cannabis imports surged fourfold, solidifying its position as Europe's top market. B NOBLE donated $25,000 to The Bronx Defenders for cannabis-related criminal justice reform. WWE removed marijuana from its banned substances list. Curaleaf Holdings Inc. (OTCQX:CURLF) partnered with Total Wine & More to expand THC beverage distribution. California's CAKE brand expanded into Nevada with its signature vape devices. Benzinga's Cannabis Market Spotlight: New Jersey event will take place on March 4. The industry continues to witness regulatory shifts and corporate expansions, reflecting the dynamic nature of the cannabis market.

news.headline: Ethereum's Pectra update may decrease Ether selling pressure, setting foundation for future market surge. #crypto #upgrade #Ethereum
news.summary: The Pectra upgrade is designed to decrease selling pressure on Ether, with the goal of boosting long-term price appreciation.

news.headline: Dr. Rod J. Rohrich hosts 42nd Dallas Rhinoplasty Meeting from Feb 28 to Mar 2, focusing on safe and consistent results with global attendance.
news.summary: Renowned plastic surgeon, Dr. Rod J. Rohrich, is organizing the 42nd annual Dallas Rhinoplasty Meeting which will be held from February 28th to March 2nd. The event focuses on enhancing the safety and reliability of rhinoplasty procedures. Esteemed rhinoplasty specialists from various countries attend this meeting. The event concludes in Dallas on March 2nd.

news.headline: Ellomay Capital secures financing for 198 MW solar portfolio in Italy. Agreements with European investor for construction expenses.
news.summary: On March 02, 2025, Ellomay Capital Ltd. announced that its subsidiary, Ellomay Holdings Luxembourg Sarl, has secured Project Finance agreements with a European institutional investor to fund the construction of their Italian Solar Portfolio. This portfolio comprises 198 MW of solar facilities in Italy, including three operational facilities totaling around 38 MW and projects in the ready-to-build stage totaling approximately 160 MW. The financing aims to cover construction and associated costs for these projects. Ellomay focuses on renewable energy and power generation in Europe, Israel, and the USA. Ellomay Capital Ltd. is listed on NYSE American and TASE under the ticker symbol ELLO.

news.headline: Warning: Junk bond spreads flash 2007 crisis signals as Otavio Costa predicts market reversal with credit spreads below 3%.
news.summary: Last week was packed with key economic updates, investor sentiments, political trust metrics, future projections, and housing sector shifts. Noteworthy stories included an economist's caution on junk bond spreads and Warren Buffett's thoughts on corporate taxes. Renowned economist Otavio Costa from Crescat Capital raised an alarm about the extended period of historically low junk bond spreads, suggesting a possible market turnaround akin to the 2007 financial crisis. Costa highlighted that high-yield bond spreads have been under 3% for more than 100 days, signaling potential risks. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: BTC hits $78K, slides post-election gains. Market cap dips below 2021's peak. ETH down 9% since election. BTC ETF outflows reach $2.4bn. Sell a kidney for BTC, suggests Saylor. Texas BTC reserve bill passed 9-0. AZ crypto bills progress. StanChart predicts $500k for BTC pre-Trump exit. SEC drops Metamask case, mum on XRP. Consensys case dropped. Stablecoin laws a priority for Lummis. Metamask adds SOL, BTC support. ETH upgrade on track after test blip. BitMEX up for sale. Uniswap launches offramp with Moonpay. Coinbase, NEAR partner for OpenAI. BITMEX on the market for buyers.
news.summary: Bitcoin has surged to $78,000, nearly wiping out election gains, while the overall cryptocurrency market cap has fallen below the peak in 2021. Ethereum has dropped by 9% since the election. Bitcoin ETFs have seen outflows of $2.4 billion this week. The digital currency rebounded following a positive PCE inflation figure. Michael Saylor advises people to hold onto Bitcoin, even suggesting selling a kidney if necessary. A Texas bill to establish a Bitcoin reserve has passed with a unanimous 9-0 vote. Arizona is edging closer to enacting crypto legislation. There is speculation that Bitcoin could reach $500,000 before Trump's departure, according to StanChart. The SEC has dropped a case against Metamask and remains silent on XRP. The enforcement case against Consensys is also set to be dropped. The Ethereum Foundation has enlisted external advisors for guidance on values. Senator Lummis emphasizes that stablecoin legislation is a top priority. Metamask is planning to support Solana and Bitcoin. Base has integrated Flashblocks to boost transaction speed by 10x. Despite a test failure, the ETH upgrade remains on schedule. BitMEX is reportedly up for sale. Uniswap has introduced an offramp service in partnership with Moonpay. Coinbase and NEAR are collaborating on OpenAI services. There is news of BitMEX looking for a buyer in the crypto exchange space.

news.headline: Increase in Bitcoin activity suggests potential market bottom & reversal after recent correction, as active addresses surge.
news.summary: The increasing number of active addresses in Bitcoin suggests a potential shift in the crypto market following a recent correction. This surge in activity could indicate a forthcoming turning point for Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies.

"Firefly's Blue Ghost Mission 1 carrying NASA science lands on Moon at 3:34 a.m. EST near Mons Latreille in Mare Crisium."
news.summary: On March 2, 2025, in Washington, Firefly Aerospace's Blue Ghost Mission 1 landed at 3:34 a.m. EST near Mons Latreille within Mare Crisium, a basin over 300 miles wide. Carrying NASA technology, the mission was a success.

news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, on March 2, 2025, HIKMICRO, a top innovator in hunting technology, revealed its future plans at the IWA Outdoor Classics 2025 event in Nuremberg. The company presented revolutionary advancements and detailed its new "digital" vision.

Belkin introduces new tech at MWC 2025: Over-Ear Audio, Smart Storage, and Responsible Power Solutions. Showcasing sustainability.
news.summary: Belkin, a renowned consumer electronics brand with a history spanning over 40 years, unveiled a range of cutting-edge products in the Mobile Power, Audio, and Connectivity categories at ShowStoppers during Mobile World Congress in Barcelona. This event is a key platform for media highlighting mobile technology trends. The new product line emphasizes Belkin's dedication to top-notch design, environmental responsibility, and premium quality. The company's focus on sustainability and innovation is evident in these launches, showcasing their ongoing commitment to providing leading-edge solutions for consumers.

news.headline: Startup from Texas triumphs, landing spacecraft on moon; milestone achievement in space exploration.
Watch live: Firefly's Blue Ghost Mission 1 successfully lands on the moon! It's the second privately built spacecraft to achieve this feat.
news.summary: A robotic spacecraft, part of a trio set to land on the moon this year, has achieved a soft landing, marking it as the second privately developed spacecraft to do so.

news.headline: China set a strong economic foundation for 2025 with stimulus measures and policy frameworks. Despite challenges, China's economy surged with robust Q4 GDP performance. President Xi Jinping highlights stable foundation and potential for long-term growth.
news.summary: China has implemented targeted stimulus measures and high-level policy frameworks to propel economic growth in 2025. The economy has seen a surge since September, with strong GDP performance in the fourth quarter indicating a robust start. This momentum was sustained through the Chinese New Year due to these measures. President Xi Jinping acknowledged challenges from external pressures but highlighted the economy's stable foundation, resilience, and potential for long-term growth in an article published in Qiushi Journal. The strategy for 2025 emphasizes balancing external risks with domestic opportunities. China's economic growth in 2025 is shaped by stimulus measures and policy frameworks amidst global challenges.

news.headline: Couples often unaware of spouse's finances, This can lead to problems. Follow steps to improve financial transparency.
news.summary: A significant number of couples appear to lack awareness about crucial aspects of each other's finances, which can have negative repercussions. Research shows that approximately 60% of couples do not know the exact amount of their partner's salary, while nearly 45% are unsure about their partner's debt. This lack of financial transparency can potentially lead to problems in the relationship. It is essential for couples to communicate openly about money matters and work together to ensure mutual understanding and financial stability.

news.summary: A recent report indicates a surge in COVID-19 cases in a major city, with over 1,500 new cases reported in the last 24 hours. The total number of cases in the city has now surpassed 50,000, with the majority of new infections attributed to the highly contagious Delta variant. Hospitalizations have also increased significantly, with nearly 300 new admissions in the past week. Health officials are urging residents to get vaccinated and adhere to safety measures to curb the spread of the virus. The city is considering reinstating some restrictions to prevent further escalation of the situation.
